revision.comment: create module to define some common terms which should not be linked.
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/71.163.7.214|71.163.7.214]] ([[User talk:71.163.7.214|talk]]) to last version by RexxS

Protected "[[Module:WikidataIB/nolinks]]": High-risk Lua module: conforming protection to [[Module:WikidataIB]] and allow extended confirmed editors to edit. Per request at RfPP ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))

Changed protection level for "[[Module:WikidataIB/nolinks]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk Lua module]]: 600000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
7 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:WikidataIB/nolinks]]: Import just to get the source
Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure

1 revision imported: importing [[Template:Commons category]] from English wikipedia with removed timestamps to overwrite existing code, attempting to fix an error that makes the link not properly appear.
